reference: Hello, you are taking vitamin D3. You can take Tyo K or Uprise D tablets daily, or another option is to have Calcirol sachets once a week for six weeks. Along with vitamin D3, take the Shelcal five hundred milligrams tablet daily.
text: Hello, you are taking vitamin D three. You can take high OK or a two D tablet daily. Or another option is to have cowboll sachet once a week for six weeks. Along with vitamin D three, take the shell cow five hundred milligram tablet daily.
